nasb.text: The Lord said, “I will blot out man whom I have created from the face of the land, from man to animals to creeping things and to birds of the sky; for I am sorry that I have made them.”

esv.text: So the Lord said, “I will blot out man whom I have created from the face of the land, man and animals and creeping things and birds of the heavens, for I am sorry that I have made them.”

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“我要把我創造的人，從地上消滅；無論是人或牲畜，是爬行的動物或是天空的飛鳥，我都要消滅，因為我後悔造了他們。”

ccb.text: 说：“我要把所造的人从地上除掉，连同一切飞禽走兽和爬虫都除掉，我后悔造了他们。”

csbs.text: 耶和华说：“我要把我所创造的人从地面上抹掉，并且从人到牲畜、到爬行之物、到天空的飞鸟都抹掉，因为我后悔造了他们。”
